title: Liposuction system with intelligent motion sensor
abstract: A liposuction system with an intelligent motion sensor according to the present invention includes a cannula inserted in a region for operation to suck fat; a sensing unit coupled with the cannula to sense motion of the cannula; a wearing unit put on a portion of user body to measure distance of the cannula and to display the measured distance; a control unit connecting with the cannula to control the cannula transforming the motion sensed by the sensing unit and the distance measured by the wearing unit into data; a storage connecting with the control unit to store the data; and a server transmitting and receiving through a wire/wireless communicating channel and storing the data of the control unit and user information data.
claims: Claims ( 6 ) A liposuction system with an intelligent motion sensor, comprising: a cannula inserted in a region for operation to suck fat; a sensing unit coupled with the cannula to sense motion of the cannula; a wearing unit put on a portion of user body to measure distance of the cannula and to display the measured distance; a control unit connecting with the cannula to control the cannula transforming the motion sensed by the sensing unit and the distance measured by the wearing unit into data; a storage connecting with the control unit to store the data; and a server transmitting and receiving through a wire/wireless communicating channel and storing the data of the control unit and user information data. A liposuction system of claim 1, wherein the wearing unit further comprises a scan unit scanning the thickness and shape a fat layer. A liposuction system of claim 1, further comprising: an application inputting or changing the user information through a login and outputting data in communication with the server. A liposuction system of claim 3, wherein the application is capable of a video telephone between users and transmits the measured data to the server in communication with a body fat measurement device. A liposuction system of claim 1, wherein the control unit outputs 3D video data using the video data scanned by the scan unit and the user information. A liposuction system of claim 1, wherein the control unit calculates at least one of fat suction amount, body transition or post-operation management data using the data stored in the storage and the 3D video data.
